title: Gate Evidence
description: CPL-03 Gate Evidence: structured evidence record summarising whether a transcript_artifact + context_bundle pair satisfies the eval gate. Carries gate_status (passed_gate|failed_gate|conditional_gate|missing_gate), eval_summary_id back-reference, and the target_artifact_ids whose admissibility this evidence covers. This artifact records evidence only; it is not a routing or release-readiness signal and contains no authority vocabulary. Canonical routing remains with the appropriate canonical owner.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this gate_evidence artifact.

target_artifact_ids.description: IDs of artifacts whose admissibility this evidence describes (transcript_artifact + context_bundle).

gate_status.description: Structured gate status. passed_gate: every required eval passed. failed_gate: at least one eval reported fail. missing_gate: at least one required eval was absent. conditional_gate: indeterminate state; defaults to NOT routable.

eval_summary_id.description: Back-reference to the eval_summary artifact whose outcome this evidence wraps.

reason_codes.description: Structured reason codes derived from the eval_summary (e.g., REPLAY_HASH_MISMATCH, SEGMENT_TURN_DRIFT).

routable.description: Convenience flag derived from gate_status. true only when gate_status == passed_gate. Any other status (including conditional_gate) defaults to NOT routable.
